2174850.name: Dicey Birdball
2174850.description:
Dicey Birdball is a roguelike strategy sports game where you manage a team of birds playing football. Roll dice and assign them to your birds to maneuver, score goals, and win the championship. Enact leaguewide rule changes to evolve the sport of Birdball, from increasing the size of the field to summoning iceberg obstacles to touchdown teleportation.

Each run you'll take control of a different team with their own unique story and objective. Win enough matches to make it to the championship and fulfill the team's objective. Between matches you'll make decisions to improve the team such as gaining new abilities, drafting new dice, and enacting new rules.

Feature List:
Compete in turn-based, grid-based football matches using a team of up to 3 birds from 5 different classes.
Manage a team of different bird classes, each with their own unique set of abilities.
Spend seeds on new dice to increase the number of moves you can make each turn.
Guide the evolution of the sport by choosing which rules change over time, such as expanding the field and allowing alternate scoring mechanism.
Unlock new teams with different bird combinations to play with.
Unlock the ability to create your own team with custom colors and team composition.
2174850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
